raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged {$74.00} on XX/XX/XXXX for a transaction that was never made. 

I was mistakingly charged for an Annual subscription with the XXXX XXXX on my XXXX account. I cancelled the subscription. They sent {$74.00} charge to my XXXX account ( which is connected to my XXXX account. It was more than the amount of money in my XXXX account so they charged my credit card on file with them. 

When I called my credit card company the y disputed the charge to XXXX, closed my account, and sent me a new card. 

XXXX disputed my dispute and said they had nothing to do with the charge. XXXX says I own nothing for the subscription. THIS IS A MESS!.
